function_calls.name: set_specialist_briefs
function_calls.args_excerpt: {"briefs": {"menu_pricing": "Conduct a competitive menu and price analysis for Monsun (\u015awi\u0119toja\u0144ska 49, Gdynia) against its local competitive set: Bar Mleczny S\u0142oneczny, T\u0142usta Kaczka, Kurkuma Cafe, and Pueblo Desayuno. Search delivery platforms (Pyszne.pl, Wolt, Glovo, Uber Eats, Bolt Food) to pull live menu data and pricing. Compare delivery markups versus estimated dine-in pricing, and identify any active promotions, lunch deals, or trending dishes in the modern Polish/brunch space. Do not analyze social media engagement, ad spend, or visual positioning, as the marketing specialist covers those areas. Output a structured comparison detailing price ranges across key categories, markup strategies, and available promotions for each venue.", "marketing_digital": "Investigate the digital presence and promotional strategies for Monsun (\u015awi\u0119toja\u0144ska 49, Gdynia) and its competitors: Bar Mleczny S\u0142oneczny, T\u0142usta Kaczka, Kurkuma Cafe, and Pueblo Desayuno. Focus on Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, and the Meta Ad Library to see how these venues advertise their prices, lunch deals, or special promotions. Analyze their visual positioning and ranking on delivery platforms, paying attention to photo quality, profile completeness, and customer appeal. Do not pull specific dish prices or calculate delivery markups, as the pricing specialist will handle the raw numbers. Provide a structured summary of their active ad campaigns, social momentum, and visibility on delivery apps."}}
